data.title: Alchemer Positioned as a Challenger in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Voice of the Customer Platforms
data.description: In Louisville, Colorado, Alchemer revealed its latest achievement today, sharing that it has been recognized as a Challenger in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Voice of the Customer Platforms. This acknowledgment signifies Alchemer's growing influence and competitiveness in the market for customer feedback solutions, showcasing its commitment to innovation and service excellence. This distinction by Gartner, a leading research and advisory company, solidifies Alchemer's position among industry peers.

data.title: Rosalind Franklin University Doubles Helix 51 Incubator
data.description: North Chicago, Illinois - On March 12, 2026, Rosalind Franklin University of Medicine and Science revealed the growth of its Helix 51 biomedical incubator, expanding its space to accommodate more startups in the region. This expansion effectively doubles the previous space available, creating a platform for driving bioinnovation. The move signals an increased focus on fostering innovative ideas in the biomedical field.

data.title: Campbell's Posts Q2 Miss On Weather, Other Factors
data.description: The second-quarter sales and earnings of Campbell's Co (NASDAQ: CPB) fell short, with adverse weather in January being a significant factor, as per Bank of America Securities analyst Brian Holland. The company reported a 4.5% year-on-year decrease in net sales to $2,564 million, missing Street estimates of $2,617 million. Holland reiterated a Neutral rating and a price target of $30 for Campbell's stock. The non-GAAP net income of 51 cents per share also failed to meet the consensus of 57 cents. Additional analyst stock ratings can be found for further insights.

data.title: Cornerstone Building Brands Manufacturing Leader Receives 2026 STEP Ahead Award from The Manufacturing Institute
data.description: A quality and technology manager at Cornerstone Building Brands in Cary, North Carolina, has been recognized as a recipient of the 2026 STEP Ahead Award by The Manufacturing Institute.

data.title: Landsbankinn announces successful covered bond offering, raising €100 million.
data.description: A recent report highlighted that the global population has reached a staggering 7.8 billion people, with an estimated 1.3 billion individuals lacking access to electricity. Additionally, around 2.2 billion people worldwide do not have access to safely managed drinking water sources. These figures underscore the ongoing challenges faced by a significant portion of the global population in terms of basic necessities. Efforts to address these issues and improve access to essential services remain critical in ensuring the well-being and development of communities worldwide.

data.title: Iowa American Water Announces Over $55 Million Invested in 2025 Statewide Infrastructure Upgrades
data.description: Iowa American Water revealed its investment summary for system improvements in 2025, amounting to over $55 million for upgrades in water and wastewater systems. This initiative aims to enhance system reliability and water quality for customers in Davenport, Iowa.

data.title: STINGRAY CHEVROLET IN PLANT CITY PRESENTS CORVETTE Z06 TO RAFFLE WINNER AND REVEALS FUNDS RAISED FOR UNITY IN THE COMMUNITY
data.description: A Chevrolet dealership located in Plant City, Florida, known as Stingray Chevrolet, will be holding a special event on March 26, 2026, at 2 p.m. to mark the end of the 17th Annual Stingray Chevrolet New Vehicle Raffle. This event will commemorate the conclusion of the raffle that saw a total of 17 new vehicles being given away.

data.title: In HelloNation, Endodontic Expert Dr. Christopher Joubert Explains Whether Root Canal Treatment Works and How It Preserves Tooth Health
data.description: In Patchogue, N.Y. on March 12, 2026, a recent review highlighted the effectiveness of root canal treatment in eliminating infections, restoring tooth functionality, and promoting lasting oral health. The article addresses the factors that influence the success of root canal procedures and the longevity of treated teeth.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor Develops New Baby Bottle Support (SGM-657)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 12, 2026, an inventor from Chateaugay, N.Y., shared their inspiration behind creating the JOHNSON INVENTION, aimed at supporting infants during feeding. The inventor, who remains unnamed, expressed the desire to assist their daughter while managing other responsibilities. This innovative device is designed to hold the baby's bottle securely while allowing the caregiver to engage in various tasks. The specifics of how the invention functions were not detailed, but it aims to streamline the feeding process for parents.
